Hey guys, what's going on? So today we're going to go through how to set up a Facebook pixel. So what'll basically happen is you'll put that piece of code onto your website. That piece of code will relay the information back to Facebook. It's not something that's visible and I know this was covered in one of the previous videos. Essentially the Facebook pixel is not something that's visible unless you are using the Google Chrome extension for the Facebook pixel helper.
